item.description: President Trump voiced his opposition to the Supreme Court's ruling that will allow mail-in ballots that arrive late to be counted if they were sent before Election Day. The president claimed the ruling "gives people more time to vote illegally," while calling for Congress to pass election reform legislation.

media:content.media:title: Trump responds to Supreme Court ruling on mail-in ballots
media:content.media:description: President Trump voiced his opposition to the Supreme Court's ruling that will allow mail-in ballots that arrive late to be counted if they were sent before Election Day. The president claimed the ruling "gives people more time to vote illegally," while calling for Congress to pass election reform legislation.

item.title: Trump responds to Supreme Court ruling on mail-in ballots

item.description: The Supreme Court is rejecting President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve board member Lisa Cook, but did grant him more power over other independent federal agencies in a separate decision. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the two rulings and how the justices differed in their views of the president's authority.

media:content.media:title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed member Lisa Cook
media:content.media:description: The Supreme Court is rejecting President Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve board member Lisa Cook, but did grant him more power over other independent federal agencies in a separate decision. NBC News' Laura Jarrett reports on the two rulings and how the justices differed in their views of the president's authority.

item.title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed member Lisa Cook

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The Supreme Court refused to hear President Donald Trump’s attempt to overturn a jury's finding that he sexually assaulted and defamed writer E. Jean Carroll.

media:content.media:text: Image: TOPSHOT-US-POLITICS-JUSTICE-TRIAL-TRUMP
media:content.media:description: E. Jean Carroll arrives at Manhattan federal court for the second defamation trial against former President Donald Trump, in Manhattan, on Jan. 17, 2024.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump’s push to overturn $5 million E. Jean Carroll verdict

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Supreme Court on Monday refused to hear famed law professor and attorney Alan Dershowitz’s defamation claim against CNN, effectively upholding long-standing protections for the news media when reporting on public figures

media:content.media:text: Alan Dershowitz.
media:content.media:description: Famed attorney Alan Dershowitz asked the Supreme Court to revisit the landmark 1964 ruling The New York Times v. Sullivan, but the high court shot him down.

item.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Alan Dershowitz appeal in defamation case

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: In a ruling applying individual constitutional protections to new technology, the Supreme Court on Monday ruled that sweeping use of cell phone location data requires a warrant.

media:content.media:text: An illustration depicting a yellow hand holding a yellow gavel, hitting the top of a red location pin, and the background is a pink overlay of a U.S. map
media:content.media:description: "Geo-fence warrants" allow law enforcement to get broad cell location data, even without a suspect in mind.

item.title: Supreme Court rules that broad cellphone location data sweeps require warrants

item.description: Paraguay sueña con un triunfo histórico ante Alemania, que parte como amplio favorito en el duelo. Alfaro confía en un buen resultado y reúne a los guaraníes para una charla motivacional.

media:content.media:title: A cazar utopías: Paraguay apela a la unidad del equipo para enfrentar a Alemania
media:content.media:description: Paraguay sueña con un triunfo histórico ante Alemania, que parte como amplio favorito en el duelo. Alfaro confía en un buen resultado y reúne a los guaraníes para una charla motivacional.

item.title: A cazar utopías: Paraguay apela a la unidad del equipo para enfrentar a Alemania

item.description: Jorge Valdano destacó la reacción de Brasil para remontar ante Japón, elogió los ajustes de Carlo Ancelotti en el entretiempo y aseguró que la Canarinha respondió como exige su historia.

media:content.media:title: Jorge Valdano: "Brasil está a la altura de su historia" | Pasión Mundial
media:content.media:description: Jorge Valdano destacó la reacción de Brasil para remontar ante Japón, elogió los ajustes de Carlo Ancelotti en el entretiempo y aseguró que la Canarinha respondió como exige su historia.

item.title: Jorge Valdano: "Brasil está a la altura de su historia" | Pasión Mundial

item.description: La Selección Paraguay arribó al estadio para disputar su duelo de dieciseisavos de final ante Alemania en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026™. La Albirroja buscará dar la sorpresa y avanzar a los octavos de final.

media:content.media:title: Comienza la cuenta regresiva: Paraguay ya está en el estadio ante Alemania
media:content.media:description: La Selección Paraguay arribó al estadio para disputar su duelo de dieciseisavos de final ante Alemania en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026™. La Albirroja buscará dar la sorpresa y avanzar a los octavos de final.

item.title: Comienza la cuenta regresiva: Paraguay ya está en el estadio ante Alemania

item.description: La motores alemanes se ponen en marcha para su primer enfrentamiento de eliminación directa tras 12 años de ausencia en estas instancias. Se preparan en Boston para dar un gran partido ante Paraguay.

media:content.media:title: Alemania quiere regresar a la élite del fútbol y se preparan para encarar a Paraguay
media:content.media:description: La motores alemanes se ponen en marcha para su primer enfrentamiento de eliminación directa tras 12 años de ausencia en estas instancias. Se preparan en Boston para dar un gran partido ante Paraguay.

item.title: Alemania quiere regresar a la élite del fútbol y se preparan para encarar a Paraguay

item.description: El tanto sobre la hora dejó devastada a la afición del país nipón, y estas imágenes se hicieron virales porque reflejan a la perfección ese dolor.

media:content.media:title: El aficionado de Japón que quedó devastado tras la derrota ante Brasil
media:content.media:description: El tanto sobre la hora dejó devastada a la afición del país nipón, y estas imágenes se hicieron virales porque reflejan a la perfección ese dolor.

item.title: El aficionado de Japón que quedó devastado tras la derrota ante Brasil

item.description: El exdelantero paraguayo destacó el regreso del versátil Almirón para aportar físico y ofensiva ante Alemania, un rival que hoy prioriza la posesión por influencia de Pep Guardiola. Sugirió que Paraguay debe adelantar líneas para frenar el toque teutón.

media:content.media:title: Roque Santa Cruz: “Vamos a ver un Paraguay que va a proponer un partido más físico” | Enlace Mundial
media:content.media:description: El exdelantero paraguayo destacó el regreso del versátil Almirón para aportar físico y ofensiva ante Alemania, un rival que hoy prioriza la posesión por influencia de Pep Guardiola. Sugirió que Paraguay debe adelantar líneas para frenar el toque teutón.

item.title: Roque Santa Cruz: “Vamos a ver un Paraguay que va a proponer un partido más físico” | Enlace Mundial

item.description: El defensor panameño reconoció que, pese a no tener opciones de avanzar, el equipo buscará cerrar su participación con orgullo ante Inglaterra, dejar una buena imagen, sumar puntos y conseguir su primer gol en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA

media:content.media:title: José Canale: "Estamos ante una gran final para nosotros"
media:content.media:description: El defensor panameño reconoció que, pese a no tener opciones de avanzar, el equipo buscará cerrar su participación con orgullo ante Inglaterra, dejar una buena imagen, sumar puntos y conseguir su primer gol en la Copa Mundial de la FIFA

item.title: José Canale: "Estamos ante una gran final para nosotros"

item.description: Paraguay enfrenta un juego decisivo ante Alemania para continuar en su camino mundialista y su entrenador, Gustavo Alfaro, cree que las capacidades individuales y pequeños detalles serán los que darán la victoria.

media:content.media:title: Alfaro incluye el corto periodo de preparación dentro de las claves del juego ante Alemania
media:content.media:description: Paraguay enfrenta un juego decisivo ante Alemania para continuar en su camino mundialista y su entrenador, Gustavo Alfaro, cree que las capacidades individuales y pequeños detalles serán los que darán la victoria.

item.title: Alfaro incluye el corto periodo de preparación dentro de las claves del juego ante Alemania

item.description: Tras comenzar perdiendo, el equipo de Carlo Ancelotti remontó gracias a los goles de Casemiro y Gabriel Martinelli para avanzar a los octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

media:content.media:title: Brasil remonta ante Japón y sella su boleto a los Octavos de Final del Mundial 2026
media:content.media:description: Tras comenzar perdiendo, el equipo de Carlo Ancelotti remontó gracias a los goles de Casemiro y Gabriel Martinelli para avanzar a los octavos de final del Mundial 2026.

item.title: Brasil remonta ante Japón y sella su boleto a los Octavos de Final del Mundial 2026

item.description: Gabriel Martinelli con las emociones al máximo demuestra su inmensa felicidad por el dramático triunfo brasileño sobre Japón y su pase a la siguiente ronda.

media:content.media:title: Gabriel Martinelli: “No tengo palabras para describir la alegría que hay en mi corazón”
media:content.media:description: Gabriel Martinelli con las emociones al máximo demuestra su inmensa felicidad por el dramático triunfo brasileño sobre Japón y su pase a la siguiente ronda.

item.title: Gabriel Martinelli: “No tengo palabras para describir la alegría que hay en mi corazón”

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Senate Ethics Committee has dismissed allegations of misconduct by Sen.

media:content.media:text: Sen. Ruben Gallego, D-Ariz.
media:content.media:description: Sen. Ruben Gallego, D-Ariz., conducts a news conference in the U.S. Capitol on June 18.

item.title: Senate Ethics panel dismisses misconduct complaint against Ruben Gallego

item.description: Nearly half the country is on alert for dangerous oppressive temperatures with record highs expected. In the West the hot, dry weather is fueling deadly wildfires, while parts of the South are drying out after catastrophic flash flooding where at least four people died. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the forecast.

media:content.media:title: Deadly Floods, Wildfires and Heat Wave Batter the US
media:content.media:description: Nearly half the country is on alert for dangerous oppressive temperatures with record highs expected. In the West the hot, dry weather is fueling deadly wildfires, while parts of the South are drying out after catastrophic flash flooding where at least four people died. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the forecast.

item.title: Deadly Floods, Wildfires and Heat Wave Batter the US

item.description: Comcast said it plans to spin off the NBCUniversal media empire into a separate publicly traded company, separating it from the corporation’s broadcast and wireless businesses. NBC News' Brian Cheung has the latest details surrounding the planned spinoffs.

media:content.media:title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal into a separate company
media:content.media:description: Comcast said it plans to spin off the NBCUniversal media empire into a separate publicly traded company, separating it from the corporation’s broadcast and wireless businesses. NBC News' Brian Cheung has the latest details surrounding the planned spinoffs.

item.title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal into a separate company

item.description: In Venezuela, round-the-clock rescue missions are racing against time as more than 1,400 people remain unaccounted for following the powerful twin earthquakes that hit near the country’s capital five days ago. It comes as the death toll nears 1,500 and a massive global humanitarian mission takes shape. Telemundo’s Julio Vaqueiro reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Venezuela Quakes: Race for Survivors as Death Toll Hits 1,450
media:content.media:description: In Venezuela, round-the-clock rescue missions are racing against time as more than 1,400 people remain unaccounted for following the powerful twin earthquakes that hit near the country’s capital five days ago. It comes as the death toll nears 1,500 and a massive global humanitarian mission takes shape. Telemundo’s Julio Vaqueiro reports for TODAY.

item.title: Venezuela Quakes: Race for Survivors as Death Toll Hits 1,450

item.description: The United States and Iran appear to have paused hostilities following a weekend of escalating attacks that rocked the Middle East, less than a week after Vice President JD Vance announced both sides had set a foundation for a lasting peace deal. Now, a new round of peace talks appears to be on the table as the war enters its fifth month. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US and Iran Pause Hostilities After Weekend of Escalating Strikes
media:content.media:description: The United States and Iran appear to have paused hostilities following a weekend of escalating attacks that rocked the Middle East, less than a week after Vice President JD Vance announced both sides had set a foundation for a lasting peace deal. Now, a new round of peace talks appears to be on the table as the war enters its fifth month. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

item.title: US and Iran Pause Hostilities After Weekend of Escalating Strikes

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
item.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Bruce Watson sits on the front steps to his house, his dog lays on the path in front of him, and an American flag flies in front of the house
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: A silhouette of the side profile of Dina Bannick at sunset outside
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: A three-way split composite image of left, a face close up of a large wood carving statue of Donald Trump, center, David Cavannah sitting on top of a large log near other logs, and right, a wide view of a large wood carving statue of Donald Trump holding a sign that says "MAGA" with an American flag flying on a pole behind it
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Frank Chappell stands outside holding a blue flag with an insignia showing two horses, an eagle, and a ship in the center crest, text on the bottom on a red ribbon design reads "virtue, liberty, and indepence"
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Rebecca Dyer, stands in front of her home with a hand on her pregnant belly, an American flag can be seen flying in front of the house
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: From left, Rebecca Dyer watches her two sons blowing bubble in their backyard outside
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Bruce Watson stands in front of an American flag
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Close up of two rows of red white and blue stars and tassles hanging from threads
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

item.title: As the nation turns 250, many Americans say flying the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Austin Mullen
Corky Siemaszko
item.description: A 31-year-old Florida woman died after an alligator bit off one of her arms and mauled the other at a state park near Orlando, authorities and a 911 call revealed Monday.

media:content.media:text: Little Big Econ State Forest, Florida.
media:content.media:description: Little Big Econ State Forest, Florida.

item.title: Woman dies after alligator bites off her arm in Florida river

item.dc:creator: Adam Reiss
item.description: Luigi Mangione’s federal court hearing Monday was unexpectedly delayed after he became trapped in an elevator inside the Thurgood Marshall United States Courthouse in lower Manhattan, according to a court official familiar with the incident.

media:content.media:text: Luigi Mangione.
media:content.media:description: Luigi Mangione appears for a pre-trial hearing at Manhattan Criminal Court in New York, on June 17, 2026.

item.title: Luigi Mangione was stuck in an elevator ahead of a hearing at a federal courthouse in New York

item.dc:creator: Adam Edelman
item.description: The Colorado Supreme Court on Monday rejected three proposed ballot measures supported by Democrats that were designed to pave the way for a new congressional map ahead of the 2028 election.

media:content.media:text: Inside the Colorado Supreme Court.
media:content.media:description: The Colorado Supreme Court.

item.title: Colorado Supreme Court deals blow to Democrats’ redistricting push
